## Source: ghsa-malware (9a4b7c42d877e678dab0b56186898c13b0e537f9371ce2a3beee0fdf7279ef6d)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (f67c342dc8bb7b3c1a396b89796f09865373db04cd9b08034e6087bf47b324ef)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'final-shoaib' @ 1.0.0 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
